name: Ty3_LTR_family
description: Ty3 retrotransposon family in S. cerevisiae. 5.4 kb element with 340 bp 'sigma' LTRs. S288C carries 2 full-length Ty3 elements plus ~40 solo sigma LTRs. Integrates immediately upstream of Pol III transcription start sites via TFIIIB interaction. Ty3 is the founder of the gypsy-like retrotransposon superfamily.

architecture.internal_structure: 5'LTR (340 bp) - gag-pol ORFs - 3'LTR; solo LTRs are recombination products of intra-element exchange

expected_copy_count: ~2 full-length elements + ~40 solo LTRs per haploid S288C genome; strain-variable
